product_overview: Dental Lab ERP is a comprehensive enterprise resource planning system tailored for dental laboratories. It streamlines core business operations including order management, doctor/client tracking, financial management, staff administration, and quality control using a modern tech stack for performance and scalability.
core_goals: Centralize and automate laboratory operations to improve efficiency and reduce errors.
Provide real-time insights into lab performance through dashboards and analytics.
Enable seamless management of dental orders and their workflows.
Maintain detailed profiles and preferences of doctors and clients for better service.
Offer thorough financial tracking including transactions, accounts, and profitability.
Manage staff roles, attendance, and performance within the system.
Ensure secure and role-based access through robust authentication and user management.
Offer flexible system configuration and settings to adapt to different lab requirements.
key_features: Dashboard & Analytics: High-level overview with key metrics, daily activities, and designer-specific dashboards.
Order Management: Create, view, update, and manage dental lab orders through their lifecycle.
Doctor Management: Administer detailed profiles and manage preferences of doctors/clients.
Finance & Accounting: Comprehensive tracking of income, expenses, accounts, and financial reports.
Staff Management: Manage employee records, roles, and user access with role-based control.
Quality Control: Monitor and track quality issues ensuring dental product standards.
Settings & Administration: User management, role-based access, and system-wide configuration.
Authentication: Secure login and session management for authorized users.
user_flow_summary: Users authenticate via secure login to access the system.
Upon login, users land on the dashboard presenting key metrics and alerts relevant to their role.
Users navigate to order management to create or update dental lab orders, tracking progress and status.
Doctor management flows involve creating and editing doctor/client profiles and preferences.
Finance workflow includes viewing and managing transactions, accounts, and generating financial reports.
Staff management includes adding, updating employee information and assigning roles.
Administrative users configure system settings and manage user roles and access permissions.
Users log out securely to end sessions and protect system data.
validation_criteria: All user authentication flows must securely handle login, logout, and session management without data leaks.
Dashboard metrics and alerts should accurately reflect real-time system data and user roles.
Order creation and updates must validate data integrity and reflect correctly in database and UI.
Doctor profiles must support full CRUD operations with validation to avoid data inconsistencies.
Financial reports and transactions must compute correctly and be securely stored.
Staff role assignments and user management must enforce role-based access control.
Settings changes should be applied globally and persist across user sessions.
The system must be responsive and performant across supported browsers and devices.
All modules must be tested for usability and consistent error handling to ensure smooth user experience.
